modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be distracting grammar usage and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Issues with using a USB microphone on Windows 10

full_description_text: A field technician is trying to set up a USB microphone on a Windows 10 system. They are unsure how to get it working properly. The microphone is connected, but it seems not to be recognized by the system.
short_description: Issues with using a USB microphone on Windows 10
description: A field technician is trying to set up a USB microphone on a Windows 10 system. They are unsure how to get it working properly. The microphone is connected, but it seems not to be recognized by the system.
